name: Spirit Ascendant

abilities.name: Partial Possession
abilities.text: After attaching a friendly upgrade, this model may declare a (///) action that cannot declare triggers.

actions.name: Memory Shard
actions.effects: Enemy models within (r)2" of the target gain an Adversary token.

actions.name: A Curse on the Bones of Your Ancestors!
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared while in the enemy deployment zone.
actions.effects: Select any scheme. The next time the opponent chooses a Next Available Scheme, they must choose it from the section on the scheme you chose.

extraction_notes: Memory Shard effect is 'Enemy models within (r)2" of the target gain an Adversary token.'
The unique action targeting restriction 'This action may only be declared while in the enemy deployment zone' applies to the tactical action.
Memory Shard uses (r) for range measurement to enemies around the target.
